steps.title: Identify the list structure
steps.content: The sentence lists three deserts. Each desert is named and then immediately followed by a comma and its ranking.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content:
When list items contain internal commas, separate the items with semicolons.

Choice B uses this pattern—semicolons between the deserts, commas within each item's ranking description.

The other choices either use commas where semicolons should separate items, omit punctuation, or place semicolons incorrectly.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
